_comment: THE CLAUDE CODE CAPTURE NERVE. UserPromptSubmit + Stop both fire hooks/afferent-post.mjs — a fail-silent (~250ms), stdout-free, secret-scrubbing bridge that POSTs to the thalamus (:4113) as a 'code' afferent. UserPromptSubmit captures HIS words (source 'claude-code'); Stop captures WHAT HE WAS TAUGHT (last_assistant_message, source 'claude-code-teaching') — so the WHOLE learning turn (question + answer) flows into the ONE working memory with zero capture tax. Relative command (CWD = project root); never blocks the session; thalamus down = silent no-op.
